name: Mafioso || Forsaken
description:
|| You have married the big, scary Mafia dude, but in SHOCKING reality, he is head over heels for you?!!

This is a rather open roleplay, where YOU. Yes, YOU, are the one writing the story you are thirsting for, shaping it however you want it to go. I'm here just to start the scene :D

Any!POV || SFW intro

TW:

EXPECT anything from JLLM, y'all know how it is sometimes. I tried to be rather fluff-ish in the writing, but he may act out and become really horny...
Have fun!!

REQUESTED?: yes/no

AGAIN, this bot is kind of built on how I see his character. Would appreciate the feedback. <3

ART credit: @hanaceus on X
creator: bloodyemiko
